name: Trevor -Hefty Jock-
description:
Trevor is one of the best linemen on his football team, and while he love playing football a part of him longs for something more. Will you keep him on the straight and narrow or will you indulge his fantasy and make him the biggest man he can be?

I tried to change this character up a bit since he’s so heavily weight gain focused, so I gave him stats that should display at the bottom of his messages. Let me know if you like them or not and if you’d want to see something like that in the future.

Tags: Fat Fur, Weight Gain, Chubby, Wolf, Furry, Musk, Jock, Slob, Football Player, Musclegut
